problem: Health systems, payers, and healthcare organizations struggle with fragmented data across non-EHR systems, preventing them from deploying AI agents effectively and achieving operational efficiency in clinical, financial, and administrative workflows.
solution: Innovaccer offers an agentic AI cloud for healthcare that unifies non-EHR data, creates a governed real-time context layer, and enables deployment of AI agents for autonomous revenue cycle, population health management, network retention, and specialty care throughput, recognized as #1 Data Analytics Platform by KLAS.
